name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: What to watch tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
At 9pm EDT tonight, Marco will join nine
other candidates for his first presidential debate. As one of our
strongest supporters, I'm asking you to join us in our online
debate war-room.
I have no doubt that Marco's going to do
great - but it's our job to help amplify his message. That's why
our campaign set up an online debate war-room that will offer
real-time fact checking, video highlights and commentary during
the debate. Check it out: MarcoRubio.com/debate.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43289128:18495435484:m:3:1349778030:4C602E7A97A5EEFD2C249E28FC489466:r
Marco's strategy tonight is to stay
positive, and talk about his vision for a New American Century.
He will offer ideas to create more good-paying 21st Century jobs
and help people get the education and skills they need for those
jobs. He'll talk about the need for American leadership around
the world, and the need for a strong national defense.
With millions of people watching, Marco
will share his family's American journey: Only in America can the
son of a bartender and a maid stand on the same presidential
debate stage as those born into wealth and power.
Please tell your friends and family to tune
in to FOX News at 9pm EDT tonight and follow along at
MarcoRubio.com/debate.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43289128:18495435484:m:3:1349778030:4C602E7A97A5EEFD2C249E28FC489466:r

Thanks,

Terry

P.S. Get live updates during the debate at MarcoRubio.com/Debate.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43289128:18495435484:m:3:1349778030:4C602E7A97A5EEFD2C249E28FC489466:r

subject: Watch TONIGHT at 5pm EST

body:

Friend,

Tonight you have two options:

Option One: Reality TV meets politics meets a national
distraction, starring Donald Trump, or....

presidential candidate debate, tonight at 5 PM EST on FOX News.

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: New Hampshire poll out. Please help, Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

A brand new WMUR Granite State poll out of New Hampshire shows I lead Hillary Clinton 45-43 in a head-to-head matchup.

That's now the second poll where I lead her in that key battleground state.

While the media is scheming to narrow the field to a few "acceptable" Republicans, polls continue to show I am the Republican best positioned to defeat Hillary Clinton.

**[Will you help me build momentum heading into tonight's debate by agreeing to stand with me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29567831:28346069361:m:1:879035888:DB22E9ACBCDBBFE59D6B9A05863CF41A:r)**?

Many Americans are going to take their first look at the 2016 Presidential contest tonight.

And for taking a stand to defund Planned Parenthood and force illegal NSA spying to expire, the media and my Big Government opponents are going to be gunning for me.

Fellow Conservative, the Washington Machine and its pals in the press are trying to force an establishment candidate on our party.

The last thing they want is a candidate like me...

...One who is committed to upending the Big Government status quo.

That's why polls show me leading Hillary Clinton in must-win states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, Ohio, and Pennsylvania.

The media is desperate to drown out the voices of the folks like you who actually decide elections.

So I'm ready for the funny business.

In past debates, you and I have seen how moderators make themselves the story by favoring certain candidates or lobbing up softball questions to their favored establishment candidates.

And with multiple polls showing me besting Hillary Clinton in key swing states, I'm bracing for the worst.

That's why I hope I can count on you.

If my campaign can show a burst of momentum heading into tonight's debate, it will help blunt the media's tricks.

This race is wide open.

And with no candidate polling as well against Hillary Clinton as I am, it's vital I can count on your support heading into tonight's debate.

[Add your name to our website here](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYzMjgtOGFmNmYxYTMtMjE0MC00NmU0LThmMmYtYjVjOTE5ZWY1MWRiDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA1NzExYTA5DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vaW5kZXguY2ZtP3A9aW13aXRoaHVjayZzPTU4MksNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t). Sincerely, Janet Huckabee \---------- Friends, My Dad and I are headed to Cleveland along with my mom and with other members of our team as we prepare for the 1st GOP Presidential debate on Thursday. [ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYzMjgtOGFmNmYxYTMtMjE0MC00NmU0LThmMmYtYjVjOTE5ZWY1MWRiDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA1NzExYTA5DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vaW5kZXguY2ZtP3A9aW13aXRoaHVjayZzPTU4MksNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t) The stakes couldn't be higher. Millions of Americans will be tuning into the 2016 presidential campaign for the very first time and my dad will be front and center stage. We got a great piece of news this evening when Fox News announced of the 17 candidates fighting for one of 10 places in their debate we were ranked #4 based on our standing in the national polls. Our conservative message is clearly resonating. Now I need your help with something important. To give my Dad all of the encouragement he needs heading into the debate I have a favor to ask you: Will you add your name to a list of supporters praying for him and cheering him on as he heads into the debate? Will you stand with him? [Adding your name](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYzMjgtOGFmNmYxYTMtMjE0MC00NmU0LThmMmYtYjVjOTE5ZWY1MWRiDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA1NzExYTA5DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vaW5kZXguY2ZtP3A9aW13aXRoaHVjayZzPTU4MksNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t) will take less than a minute of your time, and I know it would mean a lot to him. Since we kicked off our campaign on May 5th over 289,000 people have joined our team online. Just imagine how my Dad would feel if everyone reading this email said they were standing with him! [ _**To add your name just sign here** _ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYzMjgtOGFmNmYxYTMtMjE0MC00NmU0LThmMmYtYjVjOTE5ZWY1MWRiDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA1NzExYTA5DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vaW5kZXguY2ZtP3A9aW13aXRoaHVjayZzPTU4MksNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t). After you do, I hope you will consider a small donation as well. Your support will help us win this race. And if you can’t afford to make a donation at this time, we understand. Frankly, what’s most important to my Dad is to know you are with him 100% heading into this important first debate. I hope you will [add your name on our website here](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYzMjgtOGFmNmYxYTMtMjE0MC00NmU0LThmMmYtYjVjOTE5ZWY1MWRiDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA1NzExYTA5DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vaW5kZXguY2ZtP3A9aW13aXRoaHVjayZzPTU4MksNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t). Thanks for your time this evening. The next time I email you it will be from the Fox News debate in Cleveland! God bless you for all you are doing on our behalf. With you in the fight, Sarah Huckabee Sanders
Campaign Manager |

name: Rand Paul
subject: Showtime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

As I write you, there are only two hours left until showtime.

Two hours until I take the stage with nine other GOP opponents in this battle for the Republican nomination for President.

These debates can catapult a strong candidate to the top of the polls. But a poor response to a slanted "gotcha" question by the media can end a campaign virtually overnight.

Fellow Conservative, I know I'm going to be walking into a lion's den. But I'm prepared to give an uncompromising, unapologetic defense of the ideals of liberty that I know you and I share.

**[If you're with me, please sign your Republican Debate Mandate and agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more at once](https://randpaul.com/f/republican-debate-mandate?sr=rhf080615nd2)**.

I know it's easy to get caught up in the minutiae of day-to-day campaigning and never-ending political fights. But let's not forget about the big picture...

*** That ObamaCare is making American healthcare worse for millions of Americans;

*** That our government believes it should have the authority to spy on innocent American citizens at will;

*** That members of Congress somehow can manage to continue sending our tax dollars to an organization that routinely aborts unborn children, dismembers them, and sells off their body parts for profit;

*** That we're over $18 TRILLION in debt and out-of-control spending continues like never before;

It seems everything you and I treasure today is under attack, and the belief in individual liberty that has made this nation the greatest and freest country in human history, seems to be dying before our eyes.

Fellow Conservative, the ugly truth of the matter is, it's members of BOTH parties who have brought our nation to the brink.

I was happy with my life back home in Kentucky as a physician. I loved the time I was able to spend with my wife Kelley and our kids.

But I ran for the U.S. Senate because I believed good people must do something. We all must do something if we are to save our liberties for ourselves and the next generation.

As I prepare to take the stage tonight in the first debate of the 2016 Republican Presidential nominating contest, it's still that big picture I'm most concerned with.

It's why I've decided to run for President.

With time running out, I must ask you one more time to please stand with me.

**[Please sign your Republican Debate Mandate and return it to me along with your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more today](https://randpaul.com/f/republican-debate-mandate?sr=rhf080615nd2)**.

It would mean the world to me.

That's not all. New polls in Iowa, Minnesota, and Washington show our campaign with all the momentum.
We can win this thing, friend -- but only if we're in it together. **[Please contribute $3 to Bernie's campaign today.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb232d/43f17890/5d404646/621d442c/1512509246/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie2016-momentum?refcode=em150806c") **

Jeff Weaver

Now a new poll released just yesterday shows our campaign has closed to within four points in New Hampshire: 43% to 39%. That's not all. New polls in Iowa, Minnesota, and Washington show our campaign with all the momentum. We can win this thing, friend -- but only if we're in it together. "" People ask all the time how we've done so well in the face of such long odds, and the answer is simple: when we all stand together, there is nothing we cannot accomplish. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Petition: Stand up for Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend,

**Florida Republicans are on a mission to destroy Planned Parenthood. **Rep. Ron DeSantis has co-sponsored a bill that would _remove funding from Planned Parenthood,_ and another one of my opponents just introduced a bill to completely _defund Planned Parenthood_. Florida Republicans are making it clear: they do not stand for women's health.

Planned Parenthood provides vital health services to women (and men) across the country. One in five women in America has visited a Planned Parenthood clinic at least once in their lives. My opponents aren't only against this organization -- their names are on the bills to strip their funding.

Here's the good news, though: Republicans aren't the only ones on a mission. We're on a mission, too -- to protect women's access to the health care they need. Today that access is in more danger than ever. We need to protect it.

[**Demand Republicans in Congress end their attacks on Planned Parenthood and women 's health services. Sign the petition.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2004/738133e4/3923dd32/7f953a19/1216496145/VEsH/ "http://act.murphyforflorida.com/e150807b")

Planned Parenthood is already prohibited by law from using federal funds for abortion procedures. The taxpayer dollars they get are used for other services -- like cancer screenings, prenatal care, birth control, and STI testing.

So let's call this what it really is. Republicans are getting ready to vote against money for cancer screenings. They are getting ready to vote against money for prenatal care. And they're ok with it, as long as they score political points with their Tea Party base.

**Well, I 'm not ok with it. **I don't think you are either. And today, we're going to let them know that. [**Add your name to mine and let Republicans know that you will NOT stand for this assault on women 's access to care.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2004/738133e4/3923dd32/7f953a19/1216496145/VEsE/ "http://act.murphyforflorida.com/e150807b")

I have always fought to increase women's access to reproductive health care. And that's the work I hope to bring to the United States Senate.

Thank you for joining me today.
